title: Villip Mistress
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Villip Mistresses''' were the communications aides who served the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] military as well as high-ranking officials. Usually a member of the [[Shaper caste|shaper]] or [[intendant caste]]s, a villip mistress would coordinate [[villip]] choirs during battles, allowing for quick communication between various unit leaders. [[Seef]] was one such villip mistress.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
